name: Spaghetti with Shrimp & Eggplant
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein the shrimp, then set aside.
2. Trim the ends of the eggplant and peel it. Cut into 1/2 inch cubes.
3. Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a saucepan. Add the garlic and cook, stirring, until fragrant. Do not allow to brown.
4. Add the crushed tomatoes, honey, hot red pepper flakes, basil, and parsley (if using) to the saucepan. Season with salt and pepper. Stir to combine, cover, and simmer for about 15 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Heat another 1 tablespoon olive oil in a large nonstick skillet. When very hot, add the eggplant, salt, and pepper. Cook, tossing occasionally, until nicely browned on all sides.
6. Drain the eggplant and add it to the tomato sauce. Stir to combine, cover, and cook for an additional 15 minutes or until well blended with the sauce.
7. In the same nonstick skillet, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil over high heat. Add the shrimp, salt, and pepper. Cook for one minute, stirring, until just opaque.
8. Add the cooked shrimp to the tomato sauce and stir to combine. Cook for an additional minute.
9. While preparing the shrimp sauce, bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add the spaghetti and cook until al dente (cooked to the desired degree of doneness). Drain and return the pasta to the kettle.
10. Add the shrimp and eggplant mixture to the cooked spaghetti. Toss well and serve immediately with grated parmesan cheese. Serves 4.
